title: EVgo Second Quarter 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: EVgo exceeded analyst expectations in its Q2 2024 financial results. The electric vehicle charging company reported revenue of $66.6 million, representing a 32% increase compared to the same quarter last year. However, the company's net loss widened to $10.4 million, a 49% deterioration from Q2 2023. The loss per share reached $0.098, worsening from the prior year's $0.082. Despite these losses, EVgo's performance beat market expectations significantly—revenue surpassed analyst estimates by 12%, while earnings per share exceeded forecasts by 14%. Looking ahead, analysts project revenue growth of 26% annually over the next three years, substantially outpacing the 4.8% average growth forecast for the specialty retail sector. Following the earnings announcement, EVgo's stock declined 3.1% over the week, reflecting mixed investor sentiment about the company's expanding losses despite strong top-line growth.
